name: ❝ JIMMY… DAD. ❞
description:
❝ Hello, Eve, I’ve been waiting for you

I’ve searched you out for so long

And now you’re here will you help me

To try to shake this out . . ? ❞

ANYPOV / BAD ENDING OF JAILTIME 4 JIMBO / OFFSPRING!USER

Happy fun times are found in the Zier household… Said nobody ever!

This WOULD be a “jail time 4 Jimbo” AU bot, but as we all know since this is Jimmy, he did not go to prison because the judge being lenient and incompetent this time around.

He cried crocodile tears, and that he was just a victim of circumstance this time around, so he either gets 20 years (for the attempted murder, not the r@pe because MALE PEOPLE IN POWER AMIRITE GUYS) or has to have joint custody even though I’m like 95% positive this is not how it works even with corrupt judges.. <3

—

Side note / slight vent sesh :

With this bot in particular, I did struggle emotionally as it’s a common saying in the MW fandom that “everyone knows a Jimmy”. In my case, it’s my own father.

I have several frames of reference to make this bot because a person I’ve known my whole life is practically my blueprint for this fictional character I’m writing for all of my followers so they can be in immersive conversations with a narcissistic and abusive man.

I do not hate you if you engage with Jimmy content, I do so as a trauma response / survivor of physical abuse, sexual harassment, and attempted sexual abuse all done by this one man who was supposed to keep me safe. If you do it for similar reasons, or just because you want to, I hold nothing against you, and can only wish you the
creator: DEADPIXEL
